title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0141 16-18 Cherry Lane, Bristol, BS1 3NG
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Longacre Cherry Lane Limited  Site address:  16-18 Cherry Lane, Bristol, BS1 3NG  Description of proposed development:  Change of use on ground floor from retail to 1 no. apartment  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 16 December 2025   Date by when representations must be made 23 January 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 10 February 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 23 January 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0141 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     2668-0101-01 Existing Ground Floor Plan  (PDF, 391 KB, 1 page)  2668-0201-01 Existing Cherry Lane Elevation  (PDF, 80.4 KB, 1 page)  2668-2101-02 Proposed Ground Floor Plan  (PDF, 431 KB, 1 page)  2668-2201-01 Proposed Cherry Lane Elevation  (PDF, 80 KB, 1 page)  3670- 16 Cherry Lane, Bristol - Internal Daylight Assessment  (PDF, 8.37 MB, 8 pages)  251112 Covering letter PR002208 S62 FINAL  (PDF, 276 KB, 4 pages)  Application form  (PDF, 2.48 MB, 14 pages)  BNG statement   (PDF, 253 KB, 6 pages)  cil questions  (PDF, 803 KB, 6 pages)  DER output  (PDF, 406 KB, 7 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 1.09 MB, 8 pages)  TER output  (PDF, 582 KB, 7 pages)  16-18-Cherry-Lane-Kingsdown-Bristol-Bristol-City-BS1-3NG  (PDF, 966 KB, 1 page)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   BCS18 - Housing Type  (PDF, 1.24 MB, 3 pages)  BCS21 - Quality Urban Design  (PDF, 1.27 MB, 5 pages)  BCS22 - Conservation and the Historic Environment...
